gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/218)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/218)

parts.text: يَحْيَى بْنِ الْمُبَارَكِ [عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْمُبَارَكِ]

text: عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ مَا مِنْ أَحَدٍ إِلَّا وَ بِهِ عِرْقٌ مِنَ الْجُذَامِ فَأَذِيبُوهُ بِأَكْلِ السَّلْجَمِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Yaqoub Bin Yazeed, from Yahya Bin Al Mubarak, from Abdullah Bin Al Mubarak, from Abduall Bin Jabala, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, or said, from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is no one except with him is a vein of the leprosy, therefore melt it by eating the turnip’.
en.sarwar: 3. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from Ya‘qub ibn Yazid from Yahya ibn al-Mubarak [from ‘Abd Allah ibn al- Mubarak] from ‘Abd Allah ibn Jabalah from Ali ibn abu Hamzah who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan or abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, has said, ‘Everyone has a vein of leprosy so you should dissolve it with turnips.’”
